title: Whos the craziest
wikitext:
[]: Who's the craziest?             Quote Post by Smash Genesis » Mon Jul 11, 2011 9:48 pm I honestly can't say I'm sure. Ritsuko and Misato seem to be the best at hiding their crazy, but that doesn't get me far. I wanna say one of the Children, but that still leaves us with three candidates. What do you guys think?

[]: Re: Who's the craziest?             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Jul 11, 2011 10:13 pm Smash Genesis wrote: I honestly can't say I'm sure. Ritsuko and Misato seem to be the best at hiding their crazy, but that doesn't get me far. I wanna say one of the Children, but that still leaves us with three candidates. What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Mon Jul 11, 2011 10:13 pm inb4 SEELE

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Mon Jul 11, 2011 10:24 pm Fuyutsuki.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Jul 11, 2011 10:26 pm Probably Rits Crackers. She's clearly of high intelligence and able to think logically, but everything she did after Kaji's death defied any sensible reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 11, 2011 10:28 pm Kiel/Seele, IMO.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Jul 11, 2011 11:22 pm Who's the craziest person in Evangelion? Well that depends on where exactly in the series you are. Gendo isn't really crazy per say, he just doesn't seem to understand social cause and effect at all and is like a grown up version of Shinji with more cynicism. SEELE I can't really vouch for because they aren't really shown much and are largely kept in the shadows. They defiantly seem have an obsession with death and perfection that's very evocative of the Thule Society however and I can certainly classify them (Nazis) as insane. Ritsuko is just full of craziness looking for an excuse to go off. All her passive aggressiveness and workaholic nature just kept building up more and more stress until when she finally lost it, she fucking lost it . By End of Evangelion, she basically turned into a suicide bomber. Asuka is also incredibly damaged and deluded. Seeing her mom's suicide basically fried her brain and she never recovered. She hates herself yet pretends she's the greatest thing anyone's ever laid eyes on and uses her narcissism and arrogance as coping mechanisms to hide how dysfunctional she really is. Instead of opening up to people she just expects them to read her mind and do what she wants without telling them. Then she attempts to commit suicide (debatable but I certainly think she did) and then had a breakdown to the extent that she became comatose. Plus, just remember the psychotic expressions she was making during End of Evangelion. Those are not the facial expressions a sane healthy person makes. Overall, Asuka is the craziest with Ritsuko as a close second.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Jul 11, 2011 11:33 pm SEELE, followed by Ritsuko (though somewhat self-controlled, there is a TON of madness there under the surface), and then Asuka Gendo is more neglectful and practically autistic in being obssessed with "bringing back" Yui than barking mad, and Shinji is kind of the same but way more thoughtless, emotional, and OTT in the same respects

[]:             Quote Post by Sarge133 » Mon Jul 11, 2011 11:35 pm I agree with Trajan. Asuka is easily the craziest. Ritsuko close second. Maybe Shinji (during the 3I) third. Rei isn't crazy, she's socially inept to the extreme. Gendo has been explained. Misato I feel is still mourning the 2I. Her heavy drinking and urge to get revenge on the Angels reflect that. She isn't crazy to me, she's probably one of the most sane in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Tue Jul 12, 2011 12:44 am Plus, just remember the psychotic expressions she was making during End of Evangelion. Those are not the facial expressions a sane healthy person makes.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Jul 12, 2011 8:14 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jul 12, 2011 9:22 am Fireand'chutes77 wrote: Is there a difference between "broken" and "crazy"?

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Jul 12, 2011 11:56 am I disagree with pretty much all of you. Seele, Yui and Gendo aren't crazy, they're just ambitious. The only properly crazy ones are Kyoko and Asuka. Kyoko, for all the doll love and hang-time, but she had a pretty good reason for being nuts, she only had half a soul. Asuka on the other hand is just mental, even though she had a rough childhood, there's no real excuse for running at an angel without any arms. I mean, what was she going to do, bleed on him?

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Tue Jul 12, 2011 12:21 pm I forgot about Yui, I'm sure ten plus years inside Unit 01 have done wonders for her mental health. And her 'ultimate goal' just seems kind of stupid to be honest. And has no one mentioned Naoko yet? The woman strangled a little kid when she called her an old hag - disproportionate retribution much? At least she had the decency to kill herself immediately afterwards, but still.

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Tue Jul 12, 2011 1:43 pm Trajan wrote: I forgot about Yui, I'm sure ten plus years inside Unit 01 have done wonders for her mental health. And her 'ultimate goal' just seems kind of stupid to be honest. And has no one mentioned Naoko yet? The woman strangled a little kid when she called her an old hag - disproportionate retribution much? At least she had the decency to kill herself immediately afterwards, but still.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jul 12, 2011 1:52 pm Yue wrote: I'm gonna agree on Yui. The fact that basically the events of the entire show went exactly according to a plan she cooked up says all that really needs to be said.

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Tue Jul 12, 2011 2:20 pm Bagheera wrote: But don't forget that, apart from her last decision, that was pretty much all the result of taking the least shitty option at every turn. The alternative was to let SEELE have their way, which would be far worse than any amount of crazy she actually exhibited. Now, leaving the planet, and not using Rei/Lilith to get out of the damn Eva...that's nuts. But the rest, though grim, is all fairly rational.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jul 12, 2011 2:28 pm Yue wrote: Shittiness of the alternatives notwithstanding, there's some stuff that gives me pause. How she acts when she's Unit 01 is explainable by loleva, but still worrisome, and taking Shinji to the contact experiment what the hell .

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Tue Jul 12, 2011 2:31 pm Dr. Katsuragi. He took his girl to what could be god, things get out of wack, saves Misato, and dies. Now, what I'm saying is that he isn't mentally insane, he's insane because he brought his child to what could (and almost did) end humanity, have her witness hell, and be mute for three years of her life. Oh, and he's an asshole. That's part of it too. This can serve that Misato is also one of the most sane characters. She witnessed that, and didn't become a nervous wreck. Now, within the series, I'm going to say Asuka. I would say Ritsuko, but she only got fucked up at the end of the series. Asuka was fucked up the entire time. Now, was it her fault? Hell no! She didn't have to go through that. She's unfortunate. But, she became insane through her misfortune. And that, my friends, is probably the worst type of insanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Jul 12, 2011 2:32 pm People treating character who is little more than abstracted ideal mother figure whose main function is tostand for show's core themes as a real human character and judge her actions based on standards that entails... oh wow.
